title: Tap 'THIS COURSE' tab
expected_result: The 'THIS COURSE' section becomes active and displays the top learners for the current course

title: Tap 'TOTAL' tab
expected_result: The 'TOTAL' section becomes active and displays the overall leaderboard

title: Tap CTA button in the footer
test_steps: Step 1: Tap the CTA button in the footer
expected_result: The CTA button navigates to a new screen or performs the intended action

title: Tap the floating action button in the footer
test_steps: Step 1: Tap the floating action button in the footer
expected_result: The floating action button navigates to a new screen or performs the intended action

title: Verify the background color
test_steps: Step 1: Verify the background color is a gradient of light blue at the top and white below
expected_result: The background color matches the described gradient

title: Verify the font size for titles
test_steps: Step 1: Verify the font size for titles is approximately 24sp
expected_result: The font size for titles is approximately 24sp

title: Verify the font size for body text
test_steps: Step 1: Verify the font size for body text is around 16sp
expected_result: The font size for body text is around 16sp

title: Verify the font size for captions
test_steps: Step 1: Verify the font size for captions is around 12sp
expected_result: The font size for captions is around 12sp

title: Verify the font family is sans-serif
test_steps: Step 1: Verify the font family is a sans-serif font
expected_result: The font family is a sans-serif font

title: Verify the font weight is regular
test_steps: Step 1: Verify the font weight is regular

title: Verify the contrast between text and background
test_steps: Step 1: Verify the contrast between text and background is high
expected_result: The contrast between text and background meets the WCAG AA standard (≥4.5:1)

title: Verify the touch target size for the CTA button
test_steps: Step 1: Verify the touch target size for the CTA button is at least 44x44px
expected_result: The touch target size for the CTA button is at least 44x44px

title: Verify the touch target size for the floating action button
test_steps: Step 1: Verify the touch target size for the floating action button is at least 44x44px
expected_result: The touch target size for the floating action button is at least 44x44px
